title: spergula sativa subsp. linicola
intro: Spergula sativa subsp. linicola, also known as corn spurry or corn cleavers, is a plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which help to alleviate various health issues. The medicinal properties of Spergula sativa subsp. linicola include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as menorrhagia, dysmenorrhea, and gastrointestinal problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its health benefits, and its extracts are sometimes used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
